name: cold-turkey-blocker
title: Cold Turkey Blocker
description: Manage Cold Turkey blocks, create them with optional initial websites and exceptions, and control starts, locks, device schedules, and breaks.
author: nabecite

commands.name: manage-blocks
commands.title: Manage Cold Turkey
commands.subtitle: Cold Turkey Blocker
commands.description: Search Cold Turkey blocks and start, stop, lock, edit, create, or control breaks from one contextual interface.

preferences.name: executablePath
preferences.title: Cold Turkey Executable
preferences.description: Absolute path to the Cold Turkey Blocker CLI executable.

preferences.name: commandTimeoutMs
preferences.title: CLI Timeout
preferences.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for a CLI command.

preferences.name: confirmLockingActions
preferences.title: Safety
preferences.label: Confirm before commands that may lock or immediately activate a device block
preferences.description: Ask for confirmation before commands that may lock a block or immediately activate a device block.
